caption: The video features an older man with gray hair, wearing a dark blue sweater over a light-colored shirt. He appears to be engaged in a conversation or an interview, as he is looking slightly off-camera and seems to be speaking. The setting is indoors, with a plain white wall in the background and some books stacked on a surface to his right. The lighting is soft and even, suggesting a controlled indoor environment. The man's expression changes subtly between the frames, indicating that he is actively communicating. The logo "Tiger-TV" in the top right corner suggests that this is part of a television production or broadcast.
